title: Bug: no latch inferred detection if buried in some hierarchy

features.name: latch inference from incomplete if in combinational always block
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block with an if statement that does not have an else branch, causing a signal to not be assigned in all control paths

features.name: latch inference in submodule instantiation
features.description: Code should include a submodule that contains combinational logic with incomplete assignment, instantiated in a parent module, where latch inference should be detected but is missed

features.name: interface connected to module output with latch inference
features.description: Code should include an interface connected to a module output signal that has incomplete assignment in combinational logic, where latch inference is expected but not reported
